title: Refresh the v1 release manifest for the current productization branch
outputs: Current untracked files are classified as stage, ignore, archive, or needs-human-review
Release command sequence points to the current v1 desktop gate
Manifest no longer claims stale safe-to-stage items that are not in the current review queue
do_not_do: Do not delete, move, or archive any untracked file
Do not stage historical backlog files
Do not change product runtime behavior
Do not create a release tag in this task
